violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Food items post-portioning stored in a box on the floor of the walk-in freezer.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Refrigerator and pizza ovens have food product build up. In need of cleaning

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dry storage area with soda boxes in need of sweeping. -Area behind cooking equipment in need of cleaning. -Walls behind cooking equipment in need of cleaning
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Laundered, proper handling, and storage (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
